div.head: The Secretary of State to the Minister in Poland (Gibson)
div.p: 150. Legation’s telegram No. 146, dated June 23, 5 p.m. Advise the Minister for Foreign Affairs confidentially that Department highly appreciates the attitude which his Government has taken, and add that this Government has not yet extended recognition. The outlook now is that there will be a delay in recognition. You should receive very shortly a full statement outlining the position of the Department which was given to the public on the 7th of June,Quoted in telegram no. 85, June 8, 1921, to the Chargé in Mexico, p. 406.
